user.title: HA Solar Reserve – Step 1: House & Solar Inputs
user.description: Select the sensors required to track your house's real baseline load and available solar.

data.ac_energy: AC Energy Sensor (Optional. Isolates AC usage to find baseline)
data.meter_resets_daily: Does your energy meter reset daily?

battery.title: HA Solar Reserve – Step 2: Battery Constraints
battery.description: Provide the details of your battery so the system can calculate reserves. IMPORTANT: Fill out exactly ONE of the capacity parameters below.

data.battery_sensor_type: Does your battery sensor report Energy (kWh) or Percentage (%)?

error.capacity_conflict: Please specify EITHER a sensor OR a manual number, not both.
error.capacity_missing: Please specify at least one capacity parameter (Sensor or Manual).
